text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I head to the cafeteria for lunch, when...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I forgot it! The source of all my power... my
special Salsa de la Vida!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: I can't work up my super spicy energy without it...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
There goes the whole afternoon... I'm not gonna
be able to do anything.
